title: Fortis Healthcare Global Group is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Fortis Healthcare Global Group is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
We at Fortis Healthcare Global Group are looking for an experienced Consultant Physician based out of Noida. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Fortis Healthcare Global Group:
Fortis Healthcare Global Group is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Telemedicine

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual performance appraisal
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Noida, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Fortis Healthcare Global Group!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
